description: Create MODULE_PLAN.md with full module dependency graph and wave plan. Document all 12 modules (M00-M11), their dependencies, interfaces, and wave assignment.
steps: Create docs/MODULE_PLAN.md with sections for each module M00-M11
For each module include: purpose, wave assignment, dependencies, inputs, outputs, key interfaces
Create ASCII dependency graph showing module relationships
Document Wave 0 (M00, M01, M11), Wave 1 (M02-M06, M08-M10), Wave 2 (M07 integration) ordering
Document shared contracts that all modules reference from contracts/ directory
Note safety boundaries: which modules are R3 (M04, M05, M06) vs R1/R2
acceptance_criteria: docs/MODULE_PLAN.md exists with all 12 modules documented
Dependency graph shows clear layering (foundation -> adapters -> engines -> outputs)
verification: File docs/MODULE_PLAN.md exists and is valid markdown
All module IDs M00-M11 are present in the document
